title: psephellus leptophyllus
intro: Psephellus leptophyllus, also known as the woolly daisy or crested daisy, is a flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues such as constipation, diarrhea, and stomach cramps. The plant has been reported to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating colds, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Psephellus leptophyllus is often used as a tea or tincture, with some studies suggesting its potential in treating gastrointestinal disorders.
